title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures has turned from weak to strong, the main contract closed 828. an increase of 0.79% throughout the day;some traders ere active to sell,. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
